title: /pid
text: /pid Specifies a type library to be loaded into Uniface. /pid ProgId { : Prefix } Used With /sti /mwr =com Parameters ProgId —logical name that maps to a type library, for example word.document Prefix —prefix name to precede the signature names for each type definition found in the type library. Description The switch /pid designates that ProgId is a logical name that maps to a type library, for example word.document For example, the following statement loads a type library into Uniface and converts each type definition to a Uniface signature.: /sti /mwr=com /pid Excel.Application.8:ex Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
